# IPTV Subscription UK 4K

> IPTV subscription for UK homes. 37,000 live channels, 198,000 on-demand films and series, native 4K UHD streaming and five simultaneous screens per account — from £5.85/month on the 24-month plan with a 30-day money-back guarantee.

IPTV Subscription UK 4K is a UK-focused IPTV subscription service. Every plan includes the full channel library, native 4K where broadcast, five simultaneous screens and a 30-day money-back guarantee. An optional Secure Proxy add-on and extra simultaneous connections are available at checkout as paid add-ons rather than bundled into the headline price.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://iptv-subscription-uk-4k.com/): Overview, pricing plans and features
- [Blog](https://iptv-subscription-uk-4k.com/blog): Guides on buying, using, renewing and cancelling an IPTV subscription
- [Contact](https://iptv-subscription-uk-4k.com/contact): Support channels and shared UK mailbox
- [Pricing](https://iptv-subscription-uk-4k.com/#pricing): Current plan prices and included features

## Guides

- [How To Buy An IPTV Subscription In The UK](https://iptv-subscription-uk-4k.com/blog/how-to-buy-iptv-subscription-uk): Step-by-step buying guide — verify the operator, choose a term, pay safely, and test within the refund window
- [What's Included In A UK IPTV Subscription](https://iptv-subscription-uk-4k.com/blog/whats-included-in-iptv-subscription-uk): Subscription anatomy for UK buyers — channels, VOD, catch-up, EPG, connections, add-ons and what's genuinely bundled versus marketed as bundled
- [IPTV Subscription Renewal, Cancellation & Refunds UK](https://iptv-subscription-uk-4k.com/blog/iptv-subscription-renewal-cancellation-refund-uk): UK consumer-rights guide — the cooling-off period, cancellation, refund routes, chargeback and external escalation
- [Best IPTV UK 2026 Guide](https://iptv-subscription-uk-4k.com/blog/best-iptv-uk-guide-2026): Seven-criteria buyer's framework for choosing a trusted UK IPTV provider
- [How To Set Up IPTV On Fire Stick](https://iptv-subscription-uk-4k.com/blog/how-to-setup-iptv-firestick): Step-by-step Amazon Fire Stick installation guide
